product_visual_description: Auricolare Bluetooth singolo di colore bianco lucido/perla con gancio auricolare flessibile a forma di arco che si aggancia sopra il padiglione. Il corpo principale è una capsula ovale/arrotondata bianca con un anello LED turchese/blu elettrico (#00BFFF) sul pannello frontale a forma di 'C' luminosa. Alla base del corpo principale si trovano due gommini in silicone grigio chiaro a forma di oliva per l'inserimento nel canale auricolare. Il gancio flessibile è in silicone morbido bianco con estremità affusolata. Il design è minimalista, leggero (12g), con finitura satinata/lucida. Dimensioni compatte. L'anello LED è il dettaglio visivo più distintivo: un arco circolare turchese brillante incompleto.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Auricolare Bluetooth In-Ear Wireless (AR1B) — a single white Bluetooth earphone with a flexible ear hook, a turquoise/cyan LED ring on its front face, and dual silicone ear tips.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors (keep the white body and cyan LED ring exact). Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- For images 02, 04, 06, 09: follow the LOGO INTEGRATION RULES — place the client logo (SECOND image_input) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner.
- For images 01a, 01b, 03, 05, 07, 08: DO NOT add any logo, brand name, watermark, or placeholder. Fill the full composition with useful content.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER', or similar AS TEXT in any image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif (e.g. Montserrat Bold or similar geometric sans).
Accent color throughout all images: #00BFFF (cyan/turquoise matching the LED ring).

images.name: Hero Sfondo Bianco
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Auricolare Bluetooth In-Ear Wireless (AR1B) — a single white Bluetooth earphone with a flexible ear hook, a turquoise/cyan LED ring on its front face, and dual silicone ear tips.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
For this image (01a): NO logo, NO text, NO graphics — pure white background only.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:

STEP 1 — EXTRACT AND POSITION THE PRODUCT:
Take the GiDaCom AR1B earphone pixel-perfect from the reference photo. Remove every trace of the original background. The product shows: white glossy/satin body capsule, flexible white silicone ear hook arching over the top, cyan/turquoise LED ring (incomplete 'C' arc, #00BFFF) on the front face, dual gray silicone ear tips at the base. Place the product centered in the canvas, slightly above vertical center (product occupying approx 60-70% of canvas height). Ensure the ear hook is fully visible. The product casts a very soft, natural drop shadow directly beneath it (shadow opacity 8%, blur 20px, offset Y +12px) — this shadow does NOT touch the product itself.

STEP 2 — BACKGROUND:
Pure white background RGB(255,255,255). Absolutely flat. No gradients, no textures, no patterns, no vignette. Zero text. Zero logo. Zero decorative elements. Amazon-compliant hero image standard.

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No illustrated product. No glow on product. No text. No logo. No watermark. No colored background. No effects on product.

images.name: Hero Con Effetto Sonic Burst
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Auricolare Bluetooth In-Ear Wireless (AR1B) — a single white Bluetooth earphone with a flexible ear hook, a turquoise/cyan LED ring on its front face, and dual silicone ear tips.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
For this image (01b): NO logo, NO text, NO graphics overlay on product.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO SONIC BURST:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Extract pixel-perfect: white glossy Bluetooth earphone body (capsule shape), white flexible silicone ear hook arching upward (full 'U' arch), cyan LED ring (#00BFFF, incomplete circular arc 'C' shape) on the front panel, two soft gray silicone ear tip domes at the base. Place product centered on canvas, slightly left of absolute center (horizontal center offset: -5%), occupying 65% of canvas height. THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE. Maintain a strict invisible boundary around the product — no background pixel may cross this line. Separate layer always.

STEP 2 — ADD BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Background base: very deep navy-black gradient, radial, center #0D1B3E fading to #000810 at edges.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the product — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the product:
- Explosive sonic burst emanating from behind the earphone center: concentric sound wave arcs in cyan (#00BFFF) and electric blue (#0080FF), 6-8 rings expanding outward, varying opacity (innermost 70%, outermost 10%), stroke width 2-4px.
- Between the wave arcs: prismatic light streaks in white-to-cyan (#FFFFFF → #00BFFF) radiating outward at irregular angles (12-16 streaks), length 200-400px, opacity 30-60%, Gaussian blur 3px.
- Scattered Bluetooth symbol icons (very small, 16-20px, opacity 8-12%) floating in the dark background area — purely decorative pattern.
- Bokeh particles: 20-30 small blurred circles (#00BFFF, #FFFFFF, #005FFF), sizes 8-40px, random positions in outer background area only, opacity 15-40%.
- Very subtle audio equalizer bars (abstract, purely decorative) in the bottom-left and bottom-right corners of the canvas behind the product, height 40-80px, cyan gradient, opacity 20%.
The entire effect radiates OUTWARD from behind the product center — it may NEVER overlap or bleed onto the product silhouette.
NO text. NO logos. NO watermarks. NO reserved logo space.

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No glow on product. No text. No logo. No effect touching product. No white background.

images.prompt:

This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Auricolare Bluetooth In-Ear Wireless (AR1B) — a single white Bluetooth earphone with a flexible ear hook, a turquoise/cyan LED ring on its front face, and dual silicone ear tips.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — integrate client logo (SECOND image_input) per LOGO INTEGRATION RULES.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:

Background: deep navy gradient #0A0E27 (top-left) to #1C2541 (bottom-right), overlaid with a very subtle hexagonal grid pattern at 4% opacity in #00BFFF. The gradient shifts darker toward the right side.

LAYOUT — SPLIT COMPOSITION:
LEFT 55% of canvas: product cutout (GiDaCom AR1B) from reference photo, positioned vertically centered, sized to fill approximately 70% of the left panel height. The ear hook should be fully visible. A soft circular glow ONLY behind the product (NOT on it): radial gradient #00BFFF at 15% opacity, radius 300px, centered behind the product body — strict separation from product silhouette.

RIGHT 45% of canvas: benefit list panel.
TOP of right panel: headline text in bold white, 2 lines:
'AUDIO SENZA
COMPROMESSI'
Font size: 52px. Letter spacing: 2px. Color: #FFFFFF. Underline accent: thin 3px line in #00BFFF beneath the title.

BELOW headline, 5 benefit rows with thin #00BFFF separator lines (1px, 80% width) between each:
✓ 'Cancellazione Rumore CVC6.0' — checkmark icon #00BFFF, text white bold 32px
✓ 'Bluetooth 5.2 Stabile' — same style
✓ 'Solo 12g, Ultra Leggero' — same style
✓ 'Ricarica Rapida 1.5 Ore' — same style
✓ 'Resistente Acqua e Sudore' — same style

Each row: checkmark (✓) in #00BFFF (24px), then text in white bold (32px). Row height: 90px. Consistent vertical spacing.

BOTTOM of right panel: small subtitle in #00BFFF, 22px:
'Auricolare Wireless · Modello AR1B'

Full canvas must be filled. No empty corners.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. The background behind the logo in this image is dark navy (#1C2541) — add a subtle drop shadow to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No English text. No supplier logo. No placeholder. No empty corner.

IMAGE 03 — SPECIFICHE TECNICHE · AUDIO E CONNESSIONE:

Background: very dark charcoal-black #111111 with a subtle diagonal carbon-fiber texture at 3% opacity. Bottom portion: faint horizontal gradient from #111111 to #0D1E35.

TOP SECTION (top 15% of canvas):
Full-width accent band in #00BFFF (height 6px) at the very top edge.
Title centered: 'SPECIFICHE TECNICHE' in bold white 48px, letter-spacing 4px, all caps.
Subtitle below: 'Audio & Connessione' in #00BFFF, 28px, regular weight.

CENTER SECTION (middle 65%):
Two-column layout with a thin 1px #00BFFF vertical divider in the absolute center.

LEFT COLUMN — spec cards (4 cards, dark bg #1A1A1A, rounded corners 12px, subtle #00BFFF border 1px):
Card 1: Icon 🔊 + Label 'ALTOPARLANTE' white 22px + Value '8mm Driver' #00BFFF bold 36px
Card 2: Icon 📶 + Label 'BLUETOOTH' white 22px + Value 'Versione 5.2' #00BFFF bold 36px
Card 3: Icon 🎤 + Label 'MICROFONO' white 22px + Value 'HD Integrato' #00BFFF bold 36px
Card 4: Icon 🔇 + Label 'RIDUZIONE RUMORE' white 22px + Value 'CVC 6.0' #00BFFF bold 36px
Cards evenly spaced vertically. Each card: 400px wide, 130px tall. Padding 20px.

RIGHT COLUMN — product cutout centered:
GiDaCom AR1B pixel-perfect from reference, occupying approximately 55% of right column height. The LED cyan ring on the product naturally harmonizes with the accent palette. No effects on product.

BOTTOM SECTION (bottom 20%):
Full-width dark bar #0A0A0A with top 1px line #00BFFF.
Centered text: 'CHIP BLUETRUM · TRASMISSIONE STABILE · BASSO CONSUMO' in white bold 26px.
Small dot separators (·) in #00BFFF.

Full canvas filled. No empty space.

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No English text. No logo. No placeholder. No glow on product.

images.name: Lifestyle
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the GiDaCom Auricolare Bluetooth In-Ear Wireless (AR1B) — a single white Bluetooth earphone with a flexible ear hook, a turquoise/cyan LED ring on its front face, and dual silicone ear tips.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
For this image (07): NO client logo. Pure lifestyle image, zero graphic overlays.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 07 — LIFESTYLE:

Scene: An athletic woman in her late 20s to mid-30s, running outdoors in an urban park during early morning golden hour. She is wearing athletic clothes — a sleek gray or light blue sports top and fitted leggings. Her hair is in a ponytail, naturally moving with the motion of running. She is smiling naturally, looking slightly ahead with confident, energized expression. She is wearing the GiDaCom AR1B earphone on her right ear — the white earphone with its ear hook visible, sitting naturally on the ear.

The GiDaCom AR1B earphone is the pixel-perfect photographic cutout from the reference photo, composited realistically onto her right ear. Scale and angle must be anatomically correct for an in-ear device with over-ear hook. The cyan LED ring (#00BFFF) is subtly visible on the earphone face.

Environment: Urban park path, green trees with soft bokeh background. Golden morning sunlight from upper-right, creating warm lens flare and rim light on her shoulder. Shallow depth of field — background blurred at f/2.0 equivalent. Color grading: warm golden tones in the background (#C8A060 bokeh), cooler tones preserved on the subject for clarity. Natural, cinematic photography aesthetic.

Composition: Subject positioned slightly left of center, facing 3/4 toward camera, mid-stride. Full canvas filled with scene — no empty white areas, no graphic panels, no text boxes. Purely photographic.

NO text overlays. NO logo area. NO graphic design elements. NO color bars. NO icons. Pure lifestyle photography feel — the image should look like a high-quality editorial sports photograph.

NEGATIVE: No text. No logo. No graphic overlays. No redrawn earphone. No cartoon style. No white background patches. No studio feel — must feel outdoor and authentic.

THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.

Background: deep dark navy #060D1C with a very subtle repeating pattern of small shield icons (#00BFFF at 4% opacity, 80px spacing) across the entire canvas — barely visible, purely textural. Thin accent border frame around the entire canvas: 1px solid #00BFFF, inset 16px from each edge.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. The background behind the logo in this image is very dark navy (#040810) — use white logo variant and add a subtle drop shadow for readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

NEGATIVE: No redrawn product. No English text. No supplier logo. No placeholder. No glow on product. No empty corner. No white background.

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except brand names if inevitable). No supplier brand names or logos. No placeholder text like 'LOGO HERE', '[BRAND]', 'LOGO CLIENTE', 'YOUR LOGO', 'BRAND HERE'. No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word 'LOGO' anywhere in the image. No white background except image 01a. No identical backgrounds between any two images. No cartoon or illustration aesthetic — all product appearances must be photographic cutout quality.
